title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic has released Claude Mythos, its first model in the Mythos class, which achieves top performance on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model supports vision capabilities, long-running tasks, and extended memory for complex applications.
writeup: This video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Mythos, the first model in its Mythos class, which posts top scores on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model adds vision capabilities, support for long-running tasks, and extended memory aimed at complex applications. The takeaways center on a new model tier positioned around code generation, long-context work, and multimodal input.
